blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,723 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
